meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no testing knowledge (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no testing knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup for Testing
content.seo_description: Overcome testing gaps as a freelancer. Learn to use Claude Code and Antigravity to automate your QA process and ship high-quality client projects faster.
content.answer_block: Eliminate testing anxiety by integrating Claude Code with Antigravity to automate your test suite generation. By leveraging AI-driven unit tests, you transform your codebase from fragile to production-ready, ensuring you ship bug-free features rapidly while maintaining professional standards that impress your clients every single time.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a deadline. The code works on your machine, but you know deep down that 'no testing knowledge' is a ticking time bomb waiting to explode once the client logs in. The fear of breaking production isn't just a technical hurdle—it's a bottleneck that keeps you from scaling your freelance business.

Stop relying on manual verification. By mastering Claude Code and Antigravity, you can offload the heavy lifting of QA to an intelligent agent that understands your architecture better than you do. It’s time to move from 'hope-driven development' to a robust, automated workflow that gives you the confidence to ship faster than ever.

steps.title: Initialize Test Environment
steps.description: Establish a standardized testing structure within your repository to ensure Claude Code can scan and inject tests effectively.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and suggest the most efficient directory layout for unit testing with Jest/Vitest.

steps.title: Automated Test Generation
steps.description: Generate comprehensive test coverage for your critical path functions using AI context awareness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the core business logic in this file and generate a suite of unit tests covering edge cases, null inputs, and error states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate unit tests for src/utils.ts with 90% coverage'

steps.title: Refactor for Testability
steps.description: Use Claude to identify tightly coupled code and refactor it into modular, testable components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify code blocks that are difficult to unit test due to dependencies and suggest a refactor for dependency injection.
steps.claude_code_command: claude refactor --target 'src/services/api.ts' --goal 'make functions pure and testable'

steps.title: Integration Testing Setup
steps.description: Create automated integration tests to ensure your API endpoints behave correctly when interacting with the database.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an integration test plan for my API routes, mocking the database layer to ensure data persistence checks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create integration tests for all POST routes in /api/v1'

steps.title: Pre-Commit Hook Integration
steps.description: Automate the execution of tests so that no code is committed unless it passes your new quality gate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Husky pre-commit script that runs only the tests related to the files currently staged for commit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Configure husky to run vitest on staged files'

pro_tips: Always ask Claude to generate 'negative test cases' first; they reveal bugs your happy-path code never touches.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation alongside your tests to maintain a 'living' spec sheet for your clients.
Keep your test files in a parallel __tests__ directory to avoid cluttering your source folder while maintaining high visibility.
Run tests in watch mode during development; the immediate feedback loop is the fastest way to learn patterns.
Force Claude to explain the logic of the tests it generates; it turns the AI into a mentor rather than just a code generator.
content.next_steps: Integrate your new test suite into your CI/CD pipeline and start charging a premium for 'Tested & Verified' delivery packages.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting testing gaps hold back your freelance career. Harness the power of AI to build bulletproof applications that clients trust implicitly. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
